creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 0.0.1.30
- Add LUA and MySQL support
- Convert to new options framework
- Support staging
- Add LICENSE
- New LIB_DEPENDS format

If you don't have time to maintain the port further, I'll gladly take it on.
